body:
## Summary of Changes Hello, I'm Gemini Code Assist[^1]! I'm currently reviewing this pull request and will post my feedback shortly. In the meantime, here's a summary to help you and other reviewers quickly get up to speed! This pull request focuses on enhancing the robustness and accessibility of the engine registry and core lifecycle management. It introduces a new AI-powered code review skill, formalizes advanced internationalization standards for type safety, and refines existing Japanese localization strings. The changes aim to improve system stability, developer tooling, and user experience, particularly concerning accessibility features and rigorous type adherence. ### Highlights * **New Code Review Skill**: A new skill definition for AI-powered code review using CodeRabbit has been added, detailing its capabilities, usage, and autonomous workflow for fixing issues. * **Enhanced Internationalization (i18n) Standards**: The Zenith Tier standard documentation now includes a section on 'Federated i18n Quality,' emphasizing physical isolation, DeepRecord types, and Branded Keys for type-safe localization. * **Updated Japanese Locale Strings**: Numerous Japanese translation keys in `packages/i18n-common/locales/ja.json` have been refined for clarity and consistency, including terms for engine status, error messages, and game-specific moves. * **Accessibility Improvement Note**: A JSDoc comment was added to `packages/ui-chess/src/elements.ts` indicating a 'Roving Tabindex state' for accessibility, aligning with Zenith Tier standards.
Changelog * **.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md** * Added a new skill definition for AI-powered code review using CodeRabbit. * Detailed capabilities, prerequisites, review execution commands (`--prompt-only`, `--plain`), result presentation, and an autonomous workflow for fixing issues. * **docs/en/ZENITH_STANDARD.md** * Introduced a new section '1.5. Federated i18n Quality (Zero-Any i18n)' under '1. Engine Bridge Standard'. * Defined standards and implementation details for physically isolated, type-safe localization resources using DeepRecord and Branded Keys. * **packages/i18n-common/locales/ja.json** * Updated various Japanese translation strings for engine-related terms (e.g., 'status', 'nodes', 'nps', 'mateIn', 'advantage'). * Refined error messages for clarity and consistency (e.g., 'workerError', 'nestedTooDeep', 'securityViolation', 'sriMismatch', 'injectionDetected', 'invalidEngineId', 'adapterNotFound', 'stalePositionId', and various invalid move/board messages). * **packages/ui-chess-elements/src/__tests__/ChessBoard.test.ts** * Imported `waitFor` from `@testing-library/dom`. * **packages/ui-chess/src/elements.ts** * Added a JSDoc comment to the `_focusedIndex` state property, explicitly linking it to '2026 Zenith Tier: Roving Tabindex state' for accessibility.
Activity * No human activity has been recorded on this pull request yet.
Using Gemini Code Assist
The full guide for Gemini Code Assist can be found on our [documentation page](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/review-github-code), here are some quick tips. Invoking Gemini You can request assistance from Gemini at any point by creating a comment using either `/gemini ` or `@gemini-code-assist `. Below is a summary of the supported commands on the current page. Feature | Command | Description --- | --- | --- Code Review | `/gemini review` | Performs a code review for the current pull request in its current state. Pull Request Summary | `/gemini summary` | Provides a summary of the current pull request in its current state. Comment | @gemini-code-assist | Responds in comments when explicitly tagged, both in pull request comments and review comments. Help | `/gemini help` | Displays a list of available commands. Customization To customize Gemini Code Assist for GitHub experience, repository maintainers can create a configuration file and/or provide a custom code review style guide (such as PEP-8 for Python) by creating and adding files to a `.gemini/` folder in the base of the repository. Detailed instructions can be found [here](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/customize-gemini-behavior-github). Limitations & Feedback Gemini Code Assist may make mistakes. Please leave feedback on any instances where its feedback is incorrect or counter productive. You can react with :thumbsup: and :thumbsdown: on @gemini-code-assist comments. If you're interested in giving your feedback about your experience with Gemini Code Assist for Github and other Google products, sign up [here](https://google.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2cyuGuTWsEw84yG). You can also get AI-powered code generation, chat, as well as code reviews directly in the IDE at no cost with the [Gemini Code Assist IDE Extension](https://cloud.google.com/products/gemini/code-assist).
[^1]: Review the [Privacy Notices](https://policies.google.com/privacy), [Generative AI Prohibited Use Policy](https://policies.google.com/terms/generative-ai/use-policy), [Terms of Service](https://policies.google.com/terms), and learn how to configure Gemini Code Assist in GitHub [here](https://developers.google.com/gemini-code-assist/docs/customize-gemini-behavior-github). Gemini can make mistakes, so double check it and [use code with caution](https://support.google.com/legal/answer/13505487).

performed_via_github_app.name: Gemini Code Assist
performed_via_github_app.description:
**Accelerate code reviews and improve code quality**

Bring the power of [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/) directly to GitHub, providing AI-powered code reviews on your pull requests, with automatic pull request summaries, ready-to-commit code suggestions and the ability to invoke Gemini for assistance at any point on the PR.

body:
> [!NOTE] > ## Reviews paused > > It looks like this branch is under active development. To avoid overwhelming you with review comments due to an influx of new commits, CodeRabbit has automatically paused this review. You can configure this behavior by changing the `reviews.auto_review.auto_pause_after_reviewed_commits` setting. > > Use the following commands to manage reviews: > - `@coderabbitai resume` to resume automatic reviews. > - `@coderabbitai review` to trigger a single review. > > Use the checkboxes below for quick actions: > - [ ] ▶️ Resume reviews > - [ ] 🔍 Trigger review
📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough BaseAdapterのストリームライフサイクルとSRI処理、EngineFacadeの廃棄/キャンセルガード、ProtocolValidatorの循環参照検出、ResourceInjectorの解決エラーが制御フローとして強化され、多数の関連ユニットテストとキーボードナビゲーション拡張が追加されました。 ## Changes |Cohort / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**キーボードナビゲーション拡張**
`packages/ui-chess/src/elements.ts`, `packages/ui-shogi/src/elements.ts`, `packages/ui-chess/src/__tests__/ChessBoard.keyboard.test.ts`, `packages/ui-shogi/src/__tests__/ShogiBoard.keyboard.test.ts`|Home/EndのCtrl判定を追加、PageUp/PageDownで同列の最上/最下行へ移動。対応するテストを追加。| |**Adapter ストリームとSRI処理**
`packages/core/src/adapters/BaseAdapter.ts`, `packages/core/src/adapters/__tests__/BaseAdapter.test.ts`|handleStreamCancel()を導入しストリーム取消/クリーンアップを一元化。loadWithProgressのシグネチャ型調整とSRI条件付き資産構築。多数のテスト追加（info/progress/telemetry/SRI等）。| |**EngineFacade ライフサイクル強化**
`packages/core/src/bridge/EngineFacade.ts`, `packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineFacade.test.ts`, `packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineFacade.edge.test.ts`, `packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineBridge.test.ts`|dispose()に二重廃棄ガード、アクティブタスクのキャンセルとCANCELLED EngineError記録、loaderProvider撤回処理追加。並行性・中断・冗長廃棄のテストを追加。| |**Protocol バリデーション強化**
`packages/core/src/protocol/ProtocolValidator.ts`, `packages/core/src/protocol/__tests__/ProtocolValidator.test.ts`|循環参照検出でEngineError(SECURITY_ERROR)を投げるよう変更し、i18nKey `nestedTooDeep` を適用。循環および過度ネストのテストを追加。| |**ResourceInjector とネイティブ通信のテスト改善**
`packages/core/src/workers/ResourceInjector.ts`, `packages/core/src/workers/__tests__/ResourceInjector.test.ts`, `packages/core/src/workers/__tests__/NativeCommunicator.test.ts`|リソース解決失敗時に例外を投げるよう変更（警告→例外）。NativeCommunicatorの子プロセスモックを再設計しstdout/stdin/send/kill等の振る舞いと多数の入出力テストを追加。| |**設定・ユーティリティのテスト追加**
`packages/core/src/utils/ConfigValidator.ts`, `packages/core/src/utils/__tests__/ConfigValidator.test.ts`, `packages/core/src/utils/__tests__/deepMerge.test.ts`|IEngineSourceConfigの未使用インポートを削除。ConfigValidatorとdeepMergeに対する包括的なテストを追加。| |**Loader 廃棄とBlob URL 管理**
`packages/core/src/bridge/__tests__/EngineLoader.test.ts`|dispose/revokeAllでBlob URLが確実に破棄されることを検証するテストを追加。| |**ドキュメントと国際化**
`.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md`, `docs/en/ZENITH_STANDARD.md`, `packages/i18n-common/locales/ja.json`, `packages/core/src/__tests__/integration.test.ts`|Code Reviewスキルのドキュメント追加、ZENITH 標準にFederated i18n Quality節追加。日本語ロケール文字列の文言・句読点正規化。| ## Sequence Diagram(s) ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Client participant EngineFacade participant Adapter participant Loader participant ResourceInjector Client->>EngineFacade: load(config) EngineFacade->>Adapter: acquire / ensure adapter EngineFacade->>Loader: loader.load(config) Loader->>ResourceInjector: resolve resources (may throw) ResourceInjector-->>Loader: blob URLs / error Loader->>Adapter: adapter.load(resources) Adapter-->>Loader: load progress/events Loader-->>EngineFacade: result EngineFacade->>Client: loaded Client->>EngineFacade: search(query) EngineFacade->>Adapter: adapter.searchRaw(stream) Adapter-->>EngineFacade: stream reader alt cancellation/dispose EngineFacade->>Adapter: activeTaskStop / dispose() Adapter->>EngineFacade: stream cancel -> handleStreamCancel() EngineFacade->>Client: CANCELLED EngineError end ``` ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 4 (Complex) | ⏱️ ~50 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#13 — ライフサイクル管理、EngineLoader/Blob URL 廃棄、EngineFacade の廃棄/キャンセル処理に関連する変更群。 - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#33 — ProtocolValidator の注入検出・循環処理やSRI/リソース検証に関する変更と重複。 - hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines#18 — 入力検証（ProtocolValidator）とEngineFacade/ミドルウェア周りの耐障害性改善が重なるPR。 ## Poem > 🐰 流れるストリーム、そっと止めて > 循環の輪は見つけて知らせるよ > Ctrlで飛ぶはじまり、Pageで列を越え > リソースも鍵も、きちんと閉じておく > テストの野原でぴょんと跳ねるよ ✨
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 3
✅ Passed checks (3 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :----------------: | :------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | プルリクエストのタイトルは、エンジンレジストリとコアライフサイクル管理の強化、エッジケースの検証、そしてZenith Tierの統合という主要な変更を適切に要約しており、明確で具体的である。 | | Docstring Coverage | ✅ Passed | No functions found in the changed files to evaluate docstring coverage. Skipping docstring coverage check. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `task/registry-cleanup-safety`
--- Thanks for using [CodeRabbit](https://coderabbit.ai?utm_source=oss&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=hdkz-dev/multi-game-engines&utm_content=49)! It's free for OSS, and your support helps us grow. If you like it, consider giving us a shout-out.
❤️ Share - [X](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=I%20just%20used%20%40coderabbitai%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20the%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A&url=https%3A//coderabbit.ai) - [Mastodon](https://mastodon.social/share?text=I%20just%20used%20%40coderabbitai%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20the%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fcoderabbit.ai) - [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/submit?title=Great%20tool%20for%20code%20review%20-%20CodeRabbit&text=I%20just%20used%20CodeRabbit%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20proprietary%20code.%20Check%20it%20out%3A%20https%3A//coderabbit.ai) - [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcoderabbit.ai&mini=true&title=Great%20tool%20for%20code%20review%20-%20CodeRabbit&summary=I%20just%20used%20CodeRabbit%20for%20my%20code%20review%2C%20and%20it%27s%20fantastic%21%20It%27s%20free%20for%20OSS%20and%20offers%20a%20free%20trial%20for%20proprietary%20code)
Comment `@coderabbitai help` to get the list of available commands and usage tips.

performed_via_github_app.name: coderabbitai
performed_via_github_app.description:
# Transforming Code Reviews with AI

## Features

**Automated Reviews**: Continuous reviews of the pull requests including incremental commits. 

**Summarization**: Generates high-level summary and a technical walkthrough of the PR changes. 

**Line-by-line review**: Provides line-by-line suggestions committable with one click.

**Codebase verification**:  Verifies the impact on the overall codebase and identifies missing changes.

**Insights into your code**:  Ask any questions on your codebase within the pull request 

**Chat about your code** : Chat with the bot around your code. The more you chat, the smarter it gets.

**Issue Validation**:  Validates the PR against the linked issues and identifies other related issues
